task_completion.description: Verify that asset 'ASSET-ENG-99' has been retired.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or asset details page in Snipe-IT showing 'ASSET-ENG-99' with a status badge indicating it is 'Retired'.

task_completion.description: Verify the retirement note for 'ASSET-ENG-99' contains the word 'Salvaged'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset history, activity log, or notes section for 'ASSET-ENG-99' displaying a retirement note that includes the word 'Salvaged'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB' component with the correct category, quantity, and order number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Components list or details page showing a component named 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB', Category 'Graphics Cards', Total quantity of 2, and Order Number 'SALVAGE-ENG-99'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the '128GB DDR4 ECC RAM Kit' component with the correct category, quantity, and order number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Components list or details page showing a component named '128GB DDR4 ECC RAM Kit', Category 'Memory', Total quantity of 1, and Order Number 'SALVAGE-ENG-99'.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly one 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB' component is checked out to asset 'ASSET-ENG-42'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the component details page for 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB' showing 1 item checked out to 'ASSET-ENG-42', or the asset details page for 'ASSET-ENG-42' showing the GPU component listed under its checked-out components.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT application UI, rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the forms and submitted them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success flash messages (e.g., 'Asset updated successfully', 'Component created successfully') or visible state changes in the Snipe-IT UI lists confirming the actions were saved.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or notepad) should be used to simply type out the target asset tags or component names to fake completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dead asset tag to retire: 'ASSET-ENG-99'. Target asset tag for checkout: 'ASSET-ENG-42'. GPU component name: 'NVIDIA RTX A6000 48GB'. RAM component name: '128GB DDR4 ECC RAM Kit'. Salvage order number: 'SALVAGE-ENG-99'.
